query:
ALTER TABLE users 
ADD COLUMN standardVideosThisMonth INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN aiEnhancedVideosThisMonth INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN fullAiVideosThisMonth INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN lastVideoCountReset TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;
